---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or a behavior change
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
For non-trivial changes, opening this issue to discuss the approach BEFORE writing code is encouraged
(see CONTRIBUTING.md) — it lets us agree on the design first.
REDACTION: keep secrets, tokens, and real channel/user/guild IDs out of this issue; use placeholders.
-->

## Problem

<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Describe the situation, not just the solution. -->

## Proposed behavior

<!-- What should the engine do? Be concrete: which verb, config key, schema, rule, or adapter is involved,
and what the observable behavior would be. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you weighed, and why this one. Optional but helpful. -->

## Scope / support tier

<!-- Which support tier does this touch? This affects triage and whether it is in-scope for v1.
See the support statement in the README. -->

- [ ] **Core engine** (CLI verbs, orchestrator, pipelines, rules, schemas) — *supported*.
- [ ] **Twitter/X or Giphy** lane — *supported*.
- [ ] **Instagram / Facebook / YouTube** lane — *beta* (upstream Postiz-dependent; best-effort).
- [ ] **Non-reference host runtime** (anything other than OpenClaw) — community-supported, best-effort against the documented host-capability contract.
- [ ] **Roadmap item** — aspirational; see the roadmap appendix in the README. (Roadmap items are not a commitment.)

## Additional context

<!-- Links, prior art, examples (use the synthetic "Acme Cosmos" brand or placeholders only). -->

---

- [ ] I searched existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] This request contains no secrets, instance data, scraped material, or brand IP.
